entities.name: Problem stack elevation
entities.context: Principle that AI should move human experts to higher-order work (strategy, oversight) rather than automating existing low-level tasks

entities.name: Strategic oversight
entities.context: Higher-order human function focusing on goal setting and objective alignment in AI-augmented workflows

entities.name: Foundational task automation
entities.context: Pattern of AI commoditizing the 'nuts and bolts' low-level tasks in a discipline first

entities.name: Value hierarchy in professional services
entities.context: Framework explaining how relative value of higher-order judgment increases as foundational task costs approach zero

entities.name: Higher-order judgment
entities.context: Synthesis and strategic thinking that becomes more valuable as mechanical execution is automated

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company that must redesign workflows to focus on high-level strategy or risk obsolescence

entities.name: Entry-level expertise training
entities.context: Challenge created when traditional training ground of low-level tasks is removed by automation

relationships.context: Elevation moves human intervention point to strategic oversight and goal setting
Automation of foundational layers increases relative value of higher-order work
Must intentionally redesign workflows around this principle to avoid obsolescence
Elevation preserves and amplifies value of synthesis and strategic thinking
Removing low-level tasks eliminates traditional training ground for new professionals
